curation_notes: Pre-assigned as command-injection from CWE-94, but the patch fixes a sandbox boundary bypass — the vm2 sandbox is an authorization boundary and the vulnerability allows circumventing it to gain host-context code execution. Reclassified to auth-bypass. Two fix commits for this GHSA: c1db602 (strip dangerous cross-realm symbols at bridge boundary) and 261da20 (structural identity collapse for host built-in intrinsics), both modifying only lib/bridge.js. Pre-patch commit is the parent of the first fix commit (6e3b98f). Post-patch commit is the v3.11.0 release tag (fca270d). Location derived from the patch diff: all changes are within the createBridge function in lib/bridge.js. No sibling files contain the same vulnerability pattern since the bridge proxy logic is solely in bridge.js.
